---
name: "🚨 EMERGENCY: Break-Glass"
about: "Trigger the PagerDuty alarm and initiate a critical incident log."
title: "EMERGENCY: [Short Description]"
labels: ['engineering-inbox', 'break-glass']
type: Task
---

## 🚦 Triage Confirmation (Required)
*Refer to the [Official Triage Instructions](https://sites.google.com/cinegame.com/intra/alerts) before proceeding.*

- [ ] **I confirm this is a P1 (Showstopper) or P2 (Critical) incident.**
- [ ] **I understand that this will trigger a Voice/SMS alert to the global Engineering team (DK, US, PK) immediately.**
- [ ] **This cannot wait until the next business day.**

**Incident Priority:**
- **P1:** (Fixed immediately / Response: 10m) — e.g., Black screen, No money/Game, Profanity filter down.
- **P2:** (Fixed in 2-4h / Response: 30m) — e.g., Prizes not awarding, Cloud Admin down.

---

## 🚨 Emergency Context
*This issue triggers a PagerDuty voice alert to the Engineer on Duty (EoD).*

**War Room Access:**
- 🤖 **ACTION REQUIRED:** Please wait 5-10 seconds for the GitHub Bot to post the **Google Meet Link** and **Access PIN** as a comment below.
- **Denmark (DK):** +45 32 72 15 60 (See PIN in comment)
- **United States (US):** +1 617-675-4444 (See PIN in comment)

**Incident Details:**
- **Affected Product:** (e.g., CineGame, CineCard, App, CineAd)
- **Current Impact:** (e.g., "Black screen in all cinemas", "Prizes not working")
- **Incident Commander:** (Please @mention the person in charge of communications)

---

## 🛠 Active Response Log
- [ ] 🔴 Investigating
- [ ] 🟡 Identified / Workaround in progress
- [ ] 🟢 Monitoring / Resolved

---

## 📝 Compliance & Audit Log (Post-Mortem)
- **Root Cause:**
- **Remediation PRs:**
- **Resolution Timestamp:**
- [ ] **Post-mortem documentation completed**

---
**Verification:** Logged as part of the Cinemataztic Incident Response Plan. Activity is monitored for OCG/Odeon Compliance (Checkpoints 2f / 6a / 6d).

> [!TIP]
> **Triage:** Set Classification to **KTLO** in [Project 91](https://github.com/orgs/cinemataztic/projects/91) (operational/reactive incident response).
